long_description:
NRE were alerted of link issues between cbs02.eq01.ams02 et-0/0/2 <-> cbs03.eq01.par02 et-0/0/2. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19534
short_description: cbs02.eq01.ams02 et-0/0/2 <-> cbs03.eq01.par02 et-0/0/2 | Link Flap
close_notes: link is up, waiting for the RFO from provider
